channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CCTV Footage Deleted in Murder Trial of Former Police Officer
item.description: The murder trial of former Nairobi Central Police Station Officer Commanding Station (OCS) Samson Talaam and five co-accused has begun at Kibera High Court. The Director of Public Prosecution (DPP), R...

item.title: Bajabulise Thela Crowned Miss Universe South Africa 2026, Set to Represent at Global Pageant
item.description: Bajabulise Thela, a 23-year-old marketing graduate and qualified flight attendant from Mpumalanga, has been crowned Miss Universe South Africa 2026. She will represent the country at the 75th Miss Uni...

item.title: GOP Infighting Threatens Trump's Legislative Agenda as Hardliners Risk Sabotage
item.description: Republican leaders face mounting pressure to advance President Donald Trump's legislative agenda before Congress adjourns for a five-week recess. Key priorities include the SAVE Act, a controversial v...

item.title: UIF outlines the main reasons unemployment benefit claims are rejected and explains the appeals process

item.title: Simba and Yanga to Face Off in October 19 League Match at Uhuru Stadium
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming football match between Simba and Yanga scheduled for October 19 at Uhuru Stadium. This league showdown is highly anticipated by fans and players alike. The match is ...

item.title: Basketball coach faces suspension after controversial comment about opponent
item.description: Sandy Brondello, the head coach of the Australian women's national basketball team, has been temporarily suspended by the sport's governing body following a contentious two-word remark directed at a r...

item.title: Protests against education minister over exam irregularities in Delhi
item.description: A significant protest erupted in Delhi as the Cockroach Janta Party, a political group, demanded accountability from the education minister over allegations of exam irregularities. The demonstration, ...

item.title: Investors Advised to Prioritize Preserving Returns Over Chasing Gains in H2
item.description: The article discusses the evolving priorities for investors in the second half of 2026, emphasizing the need to shift focus from chasing high returns to preserving existing gains. Financial experts hi...

item.title: Atiku criticizes Tinubu over N12.8trn opaque budget allocations
item.description: Presidential candidate Atiku Abubakar accused President Tinubu of hiding trillions in the 2026 budget through opaque Service-Wide Vote allocations. He revealed that 84% of the budget is concentrated i...

item.description: The upcoming welterweight clash between Ryan Garcia (WBC titleholder) and Conor Benn, set for September 12 in Las Vegas, promises to be a high-stakes spectacle despite neither fighter being considered...

item.title: 2026 World Cup concludes with historic final and record-breaking attendance
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concluded on July 19, 2026, with the final match between the United States and Argentina at the Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas. The U.S. team emerged victorious with a 1-0 win,...

item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's two-day visit to Tokyo solidified partnerships across Japan's tech ecosystem, including a national AI factory, robotics collaborations, and chip supply agreements. The deal m...

item.title: Sokoto Rainstorm Causes Fatalities and Property Damage
item.description: A deadly rainstorm hit Sokoto State's Kware Local Government Area, claiming four lives and injuring several others. The storm destroyed numerous houses and damaged critical infrastructure like a prima...

item.title: How Mirroring Successful Products Can Enhance User Engagement
item.description: The article discusses the concept of 'mirroring' successful products to create solutions tailored for different user needs. It uses examples like protein-rich namkeen or tea for adults and an On-Call ...

item.title: NBI probes Cayetano over 2019 SEA Games procurement issues
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) is probing Senator Alan Peter Cayetano over alleged irregularities in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games (SEA Games) hosting. Cayetano, who chaired the Philippin...

item.title: FDA expands recall of Taylor Farms lettuce linked to Cyclospora outbreak
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) confirmed that a sample of shredded iceberg lettuce from Taylor Farms de Mexico tested positive for Cyclospora, a microscopic parasite causing severe gastro...

item.title: U.S.-China Competition in Africa: Tanzania's Strategic Balance
